title: Incredibly Crispy Russian Swede Fritters
description: A kid-friendly Russian dish featuring swede, these crispy fritters are flavored with citrus and are perfect for a snack or side dish. They are pescatarian-friendly and can be served with a variety of dips.
instructions: In a large bowl, combine the grated swede, flour, eggs, melted butter, lemon juice, salt, and pepper, and mix well.
Using your hands, shape the mixture into small patties, about 1 1/2 inches in diameter and 1/2 inch thick.
Heat the vegetable oil in a deep frying pan to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
Carefully place a few of the patties into the hot oil and fry for 3-4 minutes on each side, until golden brown and crispy.
Using a slotted spoon, remove the fritters from the oil and place them on a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
Repeat the frying process with the remaining patties.
Serve the fritters hot with your favorite dip or sauce.
If desired, garnish with chopped fresh herbs, such as parsley or dill.
